home.title: VERDE
home.subtitle: Turkey's first agro-luxury estate. Two villas, one living land.
home.agroTitle: The land doesn't wait for you — it lives
home.agroBody: 5,500 m² of living earth. Organic gardens, a henhouse that greets the morning, fruit trees that mark the seasons. This is not a villa with a garden. This is a garden that happens to have a villa.
home.alyaDesc: The horizon belongs to you here
home.zehraDesc: Hidden among the olives, open to the sky
home.expBody: The menu writes itself from the garden. The fire starts where the sun ends. Every moment here is designed to be felt, not just seen.
home.exp1d: Collect eggs at dawn, breakfast made from what you gathered
home.exp2d: Pick from the garden, your chef turns it into dinner
home.exp3d: Stories around the flames under a canopy of stars
home.exp4d: Night sauna, cold plunge, the Milky Way overhead
home.locTitle: Far from the world, close to everything
home.closingBody: When the mist lifts, the sea appears. When the sun sets, the fire begins. All that's missing is you.

booking.heroSub: The land is ready. The fire is waiting. All that's missing is you.
booking.s1Desc: Each villa is a private estate with its own pool, garden and dedicated concierge.
booking.alyaTag: The horizon belongs to you here
booking.zehraTag: Hidden among the olives, open to the sky
booking.s2Desc: Minimum stay {{min}} nights. Longer stays unlock complimentary experiences.
booking.warnDates: Please select check-in and check-out dates.
booking.s3Desc: {{villa}} sleeps up to {{max}} guests. Additional guests incur {{fee}}/person/night.
booking.s4Desc: Enhance your stay with bespoke services — all arranged by our concierge.
booking.s5Desc: Anything else we should know — dietary needs, celebration details, arrival time.
booking.placeholder: e.g. We're celebrating a birthday, please arrange a cake. Arriving around 16:00…
booking.summaryDesc: Select your villa and dates, then reach out — we'll craft a personalised offer.
booking.waMsg: Hello VERDE ULASLI, I'd like to book a stay.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A visual journey through the estate — from the land to the light
gallery.extDesc: Architectural renders of the villa grounds, pool and panoramic surroundings
gallery.intDesc: Living spaces designed for comfort, light and unobstructed sea views
gallery.conDesc: Progress snapshots from the build site

planner.heroSub: Revenue, cost and ROI scenario analysis for VERDE Ulaşlı
planner.chartDesc: Net profit accumulation over 15 years. First 2 years assumed zero ROI (marketing investment).
planner.foot1: * First 2 years assumed ROI = 0 due to marketing ramp-up. All calculations are EUR-based; display currency applies conversion.
planner.foot2: ** EBITDA = Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortisation
